itemSimulatorWorkspace.title: Path of Exile 2 — Item simulator
itemSimulatorWorkspace.intro: Pick a base item, choose how many prefixes and suffixes you want to roll, then preview one outcome. This is a simplified model for layout and iteration.

baseItem.title: Base item
baseItem.description: Select the item you are crafting on.

desiredMods.title: Modifiers
desiredMods.description: Add the modifiers you want on your item and adjust roll settings.

result.title: Expected result
result.description: One random outcome from the current mod pool and weights.

resultCard.empty: Choose a base item and options, then press "Roll preview".
